dict.string: DigiFence needs your location to show nearby events and verify geofence entry.
DigiFence needs background location access to monitor geofence boundaries and verify your ticket activation in real-time.
DigiFence needs background location access to monitor geofence boundaries.
DigiFence needs camera access to scan event QR codes.
DigiFence needs photo library access to select event images.
DigiFence uses Face ID for secure biometric ticket activation.
